entranceGuide: Crowds are currently concentrated at the North Gate. Using the {name} will allow immediate entry without waiting.

ticker.emergency: High congestion in Hall C. We recommend using the West Gate.
ticker.info: Interpretation equipment battery replacement is available at the 1st-floor info desk.

morning.message: Morning programs are actively in progress.

lunch.message: We'll guide you to nearby dining and rest areas.

evening.message: Check traffic information for a safe return home.

gamification.title: Spatial Stamp Tour Challenge
gamification.description: Explore the convention center, collect 20 stamps, and receive a special gift.

status.diningOpen: Dining area is now open. We recommend using the {hall} instead of the congested Hall 1.

messages.beforeConvention:
The International Convention begins tomorrow.
Get plenty of rest and we'll see you then.
messages.beforeTodayFirstSession:
Today's program will begin soon.
Please prepare at your leisure.
messages.betweenSessions: Please take a short break before the next session.
messages.fridayEnded:
Today's sessions have concluded.
See you tomorrow.
messages.saturdayEnded:
Today's sessions have concluded.
See you tomorrow for the final day.
messages.conventionFinished:
Thank you for attending the 2026 Seoul International Convention.
We hope you enjoyed the three-day program.
